get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all vehicles, filterable by status and search term.

post.description: Creates the initial vehicle record and returns its ID. Status is set to DRAFT.

get.description: Gets a list of all upcoming maintenance or unavailable periods for a vehicle.

post.description: Marks a vehicle as unavailable (e.g., for MAINTENANCE) for a specific time range.

post.description: Converts the authenticated user's account from CUSTOMER to HOST and returns new authentication tokens.
Allows an authenticated user to change their password by providing their old password.
Adds a new state linked to a country
Generates a unique referral code for the authenticated user. This can only be done once.

post.summary: Method for creating rating and reviews

409.description: Rating review with name  already exists

get.description: Performs a comprehensive search with multiple filters. If lat/lng/startDate are provided, it's a proximity search. If they are omitted, it's a general browse.

post.description: Performs a proximity search combined with attribute filtering. Returns a paginated list of vehicles and information about the search location.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all vehicle types.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new vehicle type.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all vehicle models.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new vehicle model linked to a make.
ADMIN ONLY: Bulk upload models. CSV must have three columns with headers: 'Model Name', 'Make Name', and 'Code'.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all vehicle makes.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new vehicle make.
ADMIN ONLY: Bulk upload vehicle makes. CSV must have two columns with headers: 'Name' and 'Code'.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all vehicle features.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new vehicle feature.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all vehicle colors.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new vehicle color.
Calculates the total price (including logistics and VAT) for a Service Pricing configuration without creating a booking.
Calculates the price and saves the calculation.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all platform fees.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new platform fee type.
Generates a payment link for a booking that is in PENDING_PAYMENT status using Monnify.
Generates a payment link for a booking that is in PENDING_PAYMENT status using Paystack.
Generates a secure checkout link for a pending booking. Specify the payment provider (PAYSTACK or MONNIFY) and provide a redirect URL to safely return users to your platform after payment.

post.summary: Add a User to your Corporate Account
post.description: Creates a new user and automatically links them to your organization. If the email already exists in our system, they will simply be added to your staff list.

post.summary: Bulk Add Users to Corporate Account
post.description: Creates multiple users and automatically links them to your organization. Returns a summary of successful and failed additions, ensuring partial success if some users fail.
Calculates the exact total cost for a vehicle booking. Returns a 'calculationId' to finalize the booking.
Calculates the total price (including logistics, VAT, and discounts) for an Hourly Service without actually creating a booking. Perfect for showing live price estimates on your frontend.
Creates a booking based on an hourly Service Pricing ID. The total cost is automatically deducted from your Corporate Wallet.
Finalizes a booking from a Calculation ID. The total cost is automatically deducted from your Corporate Wallet.
Creates a new organization and instantly generates a Paystack Dedicated Virtual Account for funding.
Adds an existing user to the org, or sends an email invite to a new user.

get.description: Retrieves the current KYC status (NOT_SUBMITTED, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED) and the submitted details for the organization. Must be an ORG_ADMIN.

post.description: Submits business details to unlock LIVE API Key generation. Reviewed within 2 hours.

get.description: Retrieves all active API keys for the organization. Does NOT return the raw keys. Must be an ORG_ADMIN.

post.description: Creates a new API key for the organization. Returns the raw key ONLY once. Must be an ORG_ADMIN.

post.summary: Request OTP for Saving Bank Details
post.description: Sends a verification OTP to the HOST's chosen channel (EMAIL or PHONE).

get.description: ADMIN ONLY: Retrieves a list of all defined geofenced areas. Can optionally filter by stateId.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new geofenced area (polygon).

post.summary: Check if a Location is in a Geofenced Area
post.description: Public endpoint to check if a given lat/long point falls within any defined area (e.g., OUTSKIRT, EXTREME).
Allows anyone to apply as a driver without authentication.

get.description: Public endpoint to retrieve a list of all durations.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new discount duration.
Adds a new country to the system

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all bookings. Admins see all bookings in the system. Hosts see all bookings for their own vehicles.

post.description: Creates a booking based on a previous calculation ID. Handles logged-in users, guests (if email provided matches an existing user), and booking for others. Performs an availability check before confirming.
Creates a booking based on a Service Pricing configuration (Vehicle assigned later).

get.description: All Users: Retrieves a list of all booking types. Optionally filter by 'isDefaultActive' (e.g., ?isDefaultActive=true).

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Creates a new booking type.

409.description: Blog Likes with name  already exists

post.description: Verify Phone number OTP
Verify your account after sign up
Creates an Account of any USER TYPE: HOST, CUSTOMER, DRIVER and ADMIN
Reset Password
Sends a new account verification OTP to the user's email.
Request OTP to your phone number
Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Login
Forgot Password

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all HOSTS with their vehicle and booking counts.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Provisions a new Host account. This does *not* send an email.
Blocks all vehicles for a specific host ID. Useful for emergencies or managed services.
ADMIN ONLY: Generates a new password for a Host and emails it to them.
Immediately re-opens all vehicles for a specific host ID. Cancels future blocks.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all user accounts with the ADMIN role.

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Provisions a new Admin account. Generates a password and emails it.
ADMIN ONLY: Generates a new password for an Admin and emails it to them.
ADMIN ONLY: Generates a new password for an Admin and returns it as a PDF download.

post.summary: Allocate Vehicle to Service Pricing Booking
post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Assigns a vehicle to a booking that was created via Service Pricing (initially vehicle-less). This overrides booking type restrictions but validates physical availability. It creates the Trip record and sends a confirmation email with the receipt.

tags: Service Price Year Range Set up
Service Price Year Range Set up

post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Generates/retrieves an invoice for a booking and returns it as a PDF. You can optionally specify a company bank account ID in the request body.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of group invoices. Filters available for status, date range, and search (invoice # or customer name).

post.description: Groups multiple existing bookings into one master invoice.
Marks master invoice as PAID, confirms all linked bookings, and sends one receipt.

post.summary: Add a Vehicle to Featured List
post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Adds a vehicle to the end of the featured list.

delete.summary: Remove a Vehicle from Featured List
delete.description: ADMIN ONLY: Removes a vehicle from the featured list.

post.summary: Create a New Company Bank Account
post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Adds a new bank account for the company.
ADMIN ONLY: Slices an existing segment by a specific timeframe and moves only that slice to a new vehicle. Perfect for mid-booking operational swaps or breakdowns.
ADMIN ONLY: Reassigns a booking to a different vehicle. Validates availability, compatibility, and restrictions. Recalculates price and updates Invoice automatically.

post.summary: Move Specific Booking Segments to Another Vehicle
post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Reassigns *specific days/trips* of a booking to a different vehicle. Useful for maintenance swaps or scheduling conflicts. Validates availability, updates pricing, and detaches old drivers.

post.summary: Move Pending Booking to Another Vehicle
post.description: ADMIN ONLY: Transfers an unconfirmed (PENDING_PAYMENT) booking to a new vehicle. Automatically recalculates the invoice price based on the new vehicle's specific rates.
ADMIN ONLY: Marks a booking/trip as VOID and immediately frees up the vehicle schedule.
ADMIN ONLY: Confirms a 'cash in hand' payment, sets booking to CONFIRMED, and locks the vehicle slots.
ADMIN ONLY: Manually creates a historical booking record. Skips availability checks, notifications, and payment processing. Creates the booking as COMPLETED and PAID immediately.
ADMIN ONLY: Confirms a list of offline payments. Each confirmation runs in its own transaction.

delete.summary: Unassign the Primary Driver from a Vehicle
delete.description: Removes the primary driver assignment from this vehicle. HOSTS can only unassign drivers from their own vehicles. ADMINS can unassign drivers from any vehicle.

patch.summary: Assign a Primary Driver to a Vehicle
patch.description: Assigns a primary driver to this vehicle. HOSTS can only assign their own drivers to their own vehicles. ADMINS can assign AUTOGIRL drivers to any vehicle.

patch.summary: Admin: Approve or Reject a Vehicle

patch.description: Allows an admin to update details related to host user.

get.description: Retrieves the profile details of the currently authenticated user.

patch.description: Updates the authenticated user's first name, last name, or phone number.
Uploads or replaces the authenticated user's profile picture.
Sets or updates the currently logged-in user's birthday.

patch.summary: An endpoint to  apply referral discount, when booking is ongoing.

patch.description: Toggles the active status of a staff member. Suspended staff cannot use the corporate wallet.
Allows changing the spending limit of a specific staff member.
Promotes a staff member to ADMIN, or demotes an admin to STAFF.
Toggles the active status of a staff member. Suspended staff cannot use the corporate wallet.
Allows an ORG_ADMIN to change the spending limit of an ORG_STAFF member.
Promotes a staff member to ADMIN, or demotes an admin to STAFF.

delete.description: Trash notification (Soft Delete). Can be performed on read or unread notifications.

patch.description: Mark a notification as read
Updates all unread notifications for the current user to read status.
ADMIN ONLY: Transfers an existing geofenced area to a different state (verifying boundaries first).

get.description: Retrieves a single driver's details. Admins can see their drivers, Hosts can see their own drivers.

patch.description: Updates a driver's details. Only the owner (Host/Admin) can perform this.
ADMIN/HOST ONLY: Sets the 'isActive' status for a driver. Hosts can only disable their own drivers.
Uploads or replaces a driver's profile picture. Only the owner (Host/Admin) can perform this.

patch.description: ADMIN ONLY: Sets the 'isActive' status for any user. Admins cannot disable their own account.

patch.description: ADMIN ONLY: Converts any existing user (Host or Customer) to an ADMIN.

get.description: Retrieves full details for a single trip.

patch.description: ADMIN ONLY: Updates time, location, or booking type for a trip. Automatically validates vehicle/driver availability and updates the associated schedule.

patch.summary: Assign or Re-assign a Driver to a Trip
patch.description: Assigns a driver to a trip. If a driver is already assigned, they will be replaced and notified. Admins can assign AutoGirl drivers. Hosts can only assign their own drivers to their own vehicles' trips.

patch.summary: Assign or Un-assign Admin Agents to a Trip
patch.description: ADMIN ONLY: Assigns a Customer Agent and/or Operations Agent to a trip. Send a UUID to assign, or 'null' to un-assign.

patch.summary: Mark Booking as Paid to Host

patch.description: Approves or Rejects the latest UNDER_REVIEW KYC submission. Logs the admin ID and remarks for audit purposes.
Approve, Reject, or Mark an application as Reviewed.
ADMIN ONLY: Sets a specific account as the default for payments. This will unset any other account that is currently default.

delete.description: ADMIN ONLY: Hard deletes a booking and all its history (Trips, Invoices, Transactions). This action cannot be undone. Use this for mistakes or test data.

patch.description: Updates the time, location, or booking type of a PENDING booking. Recalculates price automatically.
Allows a Customer, Host, or Admin to cancel a booking and free up the vehicle.

get.description: Ability to returned top rated vehicles as rated by customers.
ADMIN ONLY: Retrieves a paginated list of all vehicles that have been submitted by hosts and are awaiting approval.
ADMIN ONLY: Retrieves a paginated list of vehicles belonging to a specific host. Includes operational status (FREE, BOOKED, etc).
ADMIN ONLY: Retrieves counts of all vehicles by their status (Approved, Rejected, etc.)
ADMIN ONLY: Retrieves counts of all vehicles by their onboarding status (Approved, Rejected, Draft).
Retrieves the authenticated user's referral statistics, including a paginated list of referred users.

Retrieves the authenticated user's referral statistics, including a paginated list of referred users.

get.description: Retrieves the detailed public profile for a single vehicle by its UUID.

Public, unauthenticated endpoint that returns a 24-hour clock (12 AM - 11 PM) for a specific vehicle on a given date. Returns ONLY true/false for availability, masking internal reasons like maintenance or existing bookings.
Retrieves trip details using the secure token from the SMS link.
Returns all service price configurations with 10 random sample images each.
Retrieves a paginated list of all admin-picked featured vehicles.
Retrieves a list of all active company bank accounts.

get.summary: Get the Default Company Bank Account
get.description: Retrieves the single company account marked as default for payments.

get.summary: Get Public Booking Details by ID
get.description: Retrieves the full details of a single booking by its ID.
Retrieves a paginated list of all payments made by the currently logged-in user, with optional filters.
Retrieves a single payment by its ID. You must be the user who made the payment, or an Admin, to view this.
Retrieves the detailed public profile for a single vehicle by its ID, including pricing, photos, and amenities.
Returns a 24-hour clock schedule (in 30-min increments) for a specific vehicle on a given date. Returns true/false for availability.
Performs a comprehensive search with multiple filters. Uses query parameters for easy integration. If latitude/longitude/startDate are provided, it performs a proximity logistics search.
Returns all Hourly Vehicle Type Categories.
Retrieves a list of all vehicle categories available on the platform. Useful for building UI filters for your users.
Retrieves a list of all vehicle models available on the platform. Useful for building granular UI filters.
Retrieves a list of all vehicle brands/makes available on the platform. Useful for building UI filters.
Retrieves a list of all vehicle features/amenities available on the platform. Useful for building advanced search filters for your users.
Retrieves a list of all vehicle colors available on the platform, including their hex codes. Useful for building UI filters.
Retrieves a list of all currently active booking types. You will need the 'id' of a booking type to use the Booking Calculator.
Retrieves the current corporate wallet balance and dedicated virtual account numbers for funding.
Retrieves a paginated history of all corporate wallet credits (top-ups) and debits (bookings).
Retrieves a paginated list of all staff members and admins attached to your corporate account, including their spending limits and current usage.
Retrieves the complete profile and wallet details of the organization tied to this API Key.
Retrieves a paginated list of all bookings made under this corporate account.
Retrieves the full details of a specific booking, including its trips/segments. You can only access bookings made by your organization.
Retrieves the current balance and virtual account details for the organization.
Retrieves a paginated history of all credits (top-ups) and debits (bookings).
Retrieves a paginated list of all staff and admins in the organization.
Retrieves a paginated list of bookings. Admins see ALL bookings for the company; Staff members see only their OWN bookings.
Retrieves a list of all organizations the current user belongs to. Returns an empty array if none.

HOST ONLY: Retrieves the list of booking types available for the current host (combines global and specific assignments).
Retrieves statistics of the top rated vehicles for a host platform.

get.description: Retrieves statistics of the trips completed on the host platform.
Retrieves all trips (Past, Present, Future) for a specific driver ID. Includes an 'isOngoing' flag to indicate active trips.

parameters.name: tripStatus
parameters.description: Filter by computed status (IN_PROGRESS, UPCOMING, COMPLETED, etc)

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of drivers. Admins see all drivers. Hosts see only the drivers they own.

get.summary: Get Bookings for a Specific Vehicle (Admin/Host)
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all booking segments for a specific vehicle. Admins can see this for any vehicle. Hosts can only see this for their own vehicles.
ADMIN ONLY: Retrieves all detailed information for a single booking by its ID.
Retrieves the full details of a single booking. You must be the user who created the booking, or an Admin, to view this.

get.description: HOSTS ONLY: Retrieves a paginated list of all booking segments for vehicles *owned by* the currently logged-in host.

get.description: HOSTS ONLY: Downloads a PDF report of all booking segments for vehicles *owned by* the currently logged-in host.
Retrieves a paginated list of all individual booking segments *booked by* the currently logged-in user, with optional filters.

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all corporate accounts on the platform. Optionally filter by organization name using the searchTerm. Only accessible by System Admins.
Retrieves a comprehensive overview of a corporate account, including total spent, total funded, staff count, booking count, a list of their admins, and their current KYC status.
Retrieves a paginated history of all wallet top-ups and booking deductions for a specific organization. Accessible only by System Admins.
Retrieves a paginated list of all staff members belonging to a specific organization. Accessible only by System Admins.
Retrieves the full audit trail of all KYC submissions for an organization, including rejected attempts and admin remarks.
Retrieves a paginated list of all bookings made by a specific organization. Accessible only by System Admins.
Retrieves high-level KPIs across all B2B corporate accounts (Churn rate, total revenue, booking averages, etc). Perfect for admin dashboard charts.
Retrieves a list of organizations whose KYC status is UNDER_REVIEW. Sorted by oldest first so admins process the longest-waiting accounts.

vehicleId.description: The UUID of the vehicle you want to calculate pricing for.

segments.description: The list of trips/segments for this booking.

couponCode.description: Optional coupon code to apply to this calculation.

bookingId.description: The ID of the booking you want to pay for

paymentProvider.description: Choose your preferred payment gateway: PAYSTACK or MONNIFY

redirectUrl.description: The URL on your platform where the user should be redirected after payment

firstName.description: The first name of the user

lastName.description: The last name of the user

email.description: The email address of the user

phoneNumber.description: The phone number of the user

spendingLimit.description: Optional monthly spending limit for this user in NGN

users.description: List of users to add to the organization.

servicePricingId.description: The ID of the Hourly/Service category chosen.

couponCode.description: Optional coupon code to apply to the quote.

servicePricingId.description: The ID of the Hourly/Service category chosen.

calculationId.description: The ID returned from the Booking Calculator endpoint.

passengerName.description: Full name of the person taking the ride.

passengerEmail.description: Email of the passenger. If this matches an existing staff member in your Corporate Account, the booking will automatically link to their profile.
